violations.text: Inspector observed menu lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen, bar, and restroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced soap during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

Steak items are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front, side, and basement areas, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The following was observed in poor repair: - Glass sneeze guard (crack in glass) - Large hot-holding unit (door gaskets) New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets under bar have an accumulation of dust, dirt, old rodent droppings, and/or other debris. PIC cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

The walls behind mop sink AND next to steam tables are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The basement door to the outside is in poor repair (rain water leaking in). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
